---
title: "Setup"
format: html
---

# Install and update Positron

I had an old version of Positron which was giving me problems.

I set up a venv, similar to renv.

## Install/update Python and R

I had no python and an old R version

# Packages

In the venv I installe dthe following packages:

In the renv I installed the following packages:

```{r}
#install.packages("pacman")
pacman::p_load(rmarkdown, knitr, reticulate)
```
